name: proof-bot
description: A TypeScript CLI that generates evidence-backed proof-of-work comments for GitHub issues and pull requests.

scripts.demo: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js --issue https://github.com/P-r-e-m-i-u-m/ai-agent-evaluation-kit/issues/6 --commit abc1234 --check "npm test passed" --check "GitHub Actions passed" --dry-run
scripts.check: npm run build && npm test && npm run demo

author: Syed Abdul Aman
